quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are:

rules.intent: Preserve the approved brand color hierarchy and dominance.
rules.rule_text: The three approved brand colors follow a strict hierarchy: (1) Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529B) as dominant, (2) Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #FAA31B) as secondary accent, (3) Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #FFC60A) as tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.
Agenda, is the primary headline font

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Enforce approved font roles for headlines vs. body copy.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (headline.font = Agenda) is the primary headline font and must be used for all headlines and headers. Nunito Sans (body.font = Nunito Sans) must be used for all body copy in print.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

rules.intent: Lock the approved CTA shape and gradient treatment.
rules.rule_text: CTAs must use the signature asymmetric pill shape (radius.cta.signature_asymmetric = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) with the gold gradient fill running from light gold (color.cta.gradient_light_gold = #FFDF55) to dark orange (color.cta.gradient_dark = #FAA21B), per the supplied SVG.
